headline: GM’s CEO: Humans Aren’t Coding Self-Driving Cars Anymore, AI Is
summary: CEO Mary Barra dropped a number on General Motors (NYSE:GM) Q1 2026 earnings call that should make every investor in the autonomous vehicle race pay attention. “Today, nearly 90% of the code written by our autonomy team is generated by AI,” the CEO said. She framed it as proof of “how seriously we’re embracing AI ... GM’s CEO: Humans Aren’t Coding Self-Driving Cars Anymore, AI Is

headline: General Motors Company (GM) may Ditch LFP Batteries for Future EVs
summary: General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) is among the 10 Best EV Stocks to Invest In According to Hedge Funds. On June 10, Reuters reported General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) is reconsidering plans to use lithium-iron phosphate batteries for future electric vehicles. Battery chief Kurt Kelty said the company may instead prioritize lithium manganese-rich chemistry. The Detroit automaker […]

headline: Ford and General Motors Are Energy Stocks Now
summary: Should car companies become energy companies? Ford and GM -- and Tesla! -- are racing to do just that.
